title: The Disappearance of the 1923 Hollywood Star

scenes.text: A glamorous star vanished a week before her wedding.
It happened in Los Angeles, California, in 1923.
Ruth Elsie disappeared without a trace, and the media frenzy followed.
More than a century later, her fate remains a mystery.
scenes.label: FATE REMAINS A MYSTERY

scenes.text: Follow for the cases that were never solved.

description: 📍 Los Angeles, USA - 1923. Ruth Elsie vanished just a week before her wedding, leaving behind questions and a media frenzy. More than a century later, her fate is still unknown. Follow for daily cold cases!
